research_scope: CN stock factor mining only; CN ETF rotation is a separate production target and must not be mixed into this candidate set.

stopped_family.name: raw_and_repaired_cash_accrual_level_family
stopped_family.reason: Zero research leads across 115, 120, and 125 symbol replays after raw and repaired variants.
blocked_actions: Do not rerun the five raw cash/accrual statement formulas as new Round243 evidence.
Do not tune the three repaired cash/accrual candidates without a new economic mechanism.
Do not convert formula coverage or data readiness into portfolio grids.
Do not touch final holdout while designing or tuning these candidates.

candidate_ideas.hypothesis: A sharp deterioration in accrual pressure relative to the firm's own trailing history and industry peers should predict reversal, especially when price has not fully reacted.
candidate_ideas.formula_sketch: industry neutral residual of four-quarter change in accrual pressure versus the asset's trailing baseline; lower abnormal accrual pressure is better.
candidate_ideas.why_different_from_stopped_family: Uses abnormal change and residualization against history and industry, not the raw cash/accrual level ratio.
candidate_ideas.first_test: PIT matrix-label smoke followed by residual IC shape prescreen with industry, size, liquidity, value, low-vol, and momentum controls.

candidate_ideas.hypothesis: Positive profitability revisions or unexpected acceleration after the true announcement date should drift if the market underreacts.
candidate_ideas.formula_sketch: announcement-available change in profitability growth or margin proxy versus prior report expectation baseline.
candidate_ideas.coverage_risk: Revenue or margin fields must be audited before implementation; do not fall back to report-period timing.
candidate_ideas.why_different_from_stopped_family: Targets announcement surprise and revision timing instead of accrual quality level.

candidate_ideas.hypothesis: Statements with improving cash conversion and muted event-window price reaction may continue drifting after announcement.
candidate_ideas.formula_sketch: cash conversion improvement crossed with low announcement-window reaction, using first tradable signal date after ann_date.
candidate_ideas.why_different_from_stopped_family: Combines financial statement surprise with market underreaction, not standalone accounting ratios.

candidate_ideas.hypothesis: Balance-sheet stress falling while operating cash flow confirms earnings should identify improving solvency quality before broad repricing.
candidate_ideas.formula_sketch: falling liability or current-liability stress conditioned on positive operating cash flow to earnings confirmation.
candidate_ideas.why_different_from_stopped_family: Uses balance-sheet deleveraging and solvency relief rather than accrual-only levels.

candidate_ideas.hypothesis: Industry-relative improvement in profitability quality should matter more than absolute accounting quality in China's sector-driven market.
candidate_ideas.formula_sketch: industry demeaned acceleration in profitability or cash conversion, residualized by size, liquidity, value, low-vol, and momentum.
candidate_ideas.why_different_from_stopped_family: Starts from sector-relative change and style-neutral residuals, not standalone cross-sectional raw formulas.

safety: Research-to-review only. No broker connection, no account reads, no order placement, no live trading.
